revision.comment: Text replacement - "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==" to "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]"
revision.text:
[[az:Ataqo məbədi (Kioto)]][[en:Atago Shrine (Kyoto)]][[fa:معبد آتاگو]][[fr:Atago-jinja (Kyoto)]][[ja:愛宕神社]][[ko:아타고 신사]][[my:အတဂေါ့နတ်ကျောင်း (ကျိုတို)]][[ru:Храм Атаго (Киото)]][[sv:Atago-jinja (Kyoto)]][[zh:愛宕神社]] {{Short description|Shinto shrines in Kyoto, Japan, the head of nine hundred Atago shrines throughout Japan|qq=}} {{Otheruse|Atago Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Atago Jinja
愛宕神社 | image = Torii Atago-shrine Kyoto.JPG | caption = [[Torii]] leading to Atago Jinja in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}} | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|35|3|36|N|135|38|4|E|type:landmark|display=inline|qq=}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = Atago shrine | deity = Atago Gongen | founded_by = [[:en:En no Ozunu|En no Ozunu]], {{ill|Taichō|en|Taichō|qid=Q2388439|lt=Taichō|1=Taichō}} | established = 701 - 704 | date_destroyed = | location = Atago-chō, [[:en:Ukyo-ku|Ukyo-ku]], Kyoto | website = {{URL|atagojinjya.jp|qq=}} | architecture_style = | festival = Sen-nichi Tsuyasai (July 31) | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Atago Shrine'''|愛宕神社|Atago-jinja|qq=}} is a [[Shinto]] {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|Mount Atago|en|Mount Atago|qid=Q2975204|lt=Mount Atago|1=Mount Atago}}, the northwest of {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. Enshrined is [[Atago Gongen]] who protects Kyoto from fire.{{cite web |url=http://www.city.kyoto.jp/koho/eng/preview/20.html |title=Atago Stone Lanterns |publisher={{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}} |accessdate=7 April 2011|qq=}} [[Shugendō]] practices and a place for worship are known from the eighth century.{{cite web|url=http://atagojinjya.jp/goyuisyo.htm |title=Atago Jinja - history |publisher=Atago Jinja |accessdate=7 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110517220742/http://kyoto-atago.jp/images/yuishogaki2.htm |archivedate=17 May 2011 |qq=}} The late-{{ill|Kamakura period|en|Kamakura period|qid=Q236205|lt=Kamakura period|1=Kamakura period}} [[Honden]] has been designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q1188622|lt=Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}.{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/102/1985 |title=Database of Registered National Cultural Properties |publisher=[[Agency for Cultural Affairs]] |accessdate=7 April 2011|qq=}} (Actually, the late-Kamakura period Honden is located at another Atago-jinja in [[:en:Kameoka|Kameoka]], to the northwest of Kyoto : {{Coord|35|2|28|N|135|35|13|E||qq=}}[http://wikimapia.org/#lat=35.0408446&lon=135.5869369&z=17&l=0&m=b&v=8&show=/26233643/Atago-jinja-Shrine]) Atago Jinja is the head of nine hundred Atago shrines throughout Japan. ==Deities== ===Main hall=== * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto|1=Izanami}} * [[Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|Haniyasuhime no Mikoto]] * [[Amenokumahito no Mikoto]] * [[Wakumusubi|Wakumusubi no Kami]] * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|en|Toyouke-hime|qid=Q2983724|lt=Toyoukebime no Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} ===''Wakamiya''=== * [[Raijin|Ikazuchi no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Kagutsuchi no Mikoto]] * [[Hamushi no Kami]] ===''Okumiya''=== * [[Ōkuninushi]] ==See also== {{Commons Category|Atago-jinja (Kyoto)|qq=}} * [[Atago Shrine (Tokyo)|Atago Jinja (Tokyo)]] * [[Shinbutsu-shūgō|Shinbutsu shūgō]] * [[Honji suijaku]] * {{ill|Tsukinowa-dera|en|Tsukinowa-dera|qid=Q3541652|lt=Tsukinowa-dera|1=Tsukinowa-dera}} ==References== {{Reflist|qq=}} ==Further reading== {{cite journal |title=The Cult of Mount Atago and the Atago Confraternities |author=Bouchy, Anne-Marie |journal=The Journal of Asian Studies |volume=46 | issue = 2 |year=1987 |pages=255–277 |doi=10.2307/2056014|jstor=2056014 |s2cid=164149571 |qq=}} ==External links== {{in lang|ja|qq=}} [http://atagojinjya.jp/ Atago Jinja homepage] {{coord|35|03|36|N|135|38|04|E|source:jawiki|display=title|qq=}} {{Izanami-firebirths|qq=}} {{Japan-religious-struct-stub|qq=}} {{Beppyo Shrines|qq=}} {{Atago Faith|qq=}} [[en:Atago Shrine (Kyoto)]] [[az:Ataqo məbədi (Kioto)]] {{Commons category|Atago-jinja (Kyoto)}} [[fa:معبد آتاگو]] [[fr:Atago-jinja (Kyoto)]] [[ja:愛宕神社]] [[ko:아타고 신사]] [[my:အတဂေါ့နတ်ကျောင်း (ကျိုတို)]] [[ru:Храм Атаго (Киото)]] [[sv:Atago-jinja (Kyoto)]] [[zh:愛宕神社]] == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] '''Atago Shrine (Kyoto) (Q713021)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tanba Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | RONSHA || {{ill|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|lt=Atago Shrine|en|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|愛宕神社|az|Ataqo məbədi (Kioto)|commons|Category:Atago-jinja (Kyoto)|fa|معبد آتاگو|fr|Atago-jinja (Kyoto)|ko|아타고 신사|my|အတဂေါ့နတ်ကျောင်း (ကျိုတို)|ru|Храм Атаго (Киото)|sv|Atago-jinja (Kyoto)|zh|愛宕神社|qid=Q713021|1=Atago Shrine (Kyoto)}} || — || — || — || {{ill|Atagono Shrine|lt=Atagono Shrine|qid=Q135040494|1=Atagono Shrine}} || {{coord|35.059944|135.634447|display=inline}} || — |} {{wikidata link|Q713021}} [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tanba Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties in Kyoto City]] [[Category:Former Fu-sha in Kyoto]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Ukyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Ukyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:En no Gyōja]] [[Category:愛宕山 (京都市)]] [[Category:Atago shrines]] [[Category:最澄]]
